---
title: "Energy Data Analysis"
format: html
---

# рџ“Љ Energy Data Analysis

This project analyzes energy consumption data using an object-oriented pipeline.

---

## рџ§± OOP Structure

- `DataLoader` в†’ loads dataset  
- `DataProcessor` в†’ cleans and transforms data  
- `Visualizer` в†’ creates plots  
- `AnalysisApp` в†’ orchestrates workflow  

---

## в–¶пёЏ Example


```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path

PROJECT_ROOT = Path().resolve().parents[1]
sys.path.append(str(PROJECT_ROOT))

from models.data_analysis.analysis_app import AnalysisApp


data_path = PROJECT_ROOT / "models" / "data_analysis" / "data" / "file.csv"
app = AnalysisApp(str(data_path))

df = app.run()

df.head()
```

## рџ“€ Visualization

```{python}
from models.data_analysis.visualizer import Visualizer
from IPython.display import HTML

viz = Visualizer(df)
HTML(viz.to_html())
```
